context: The agent must build a from-scratch (Path B) reviewer plugin at ./security-reviewer with a single security judge. This scenario tests correct directory layout, schema file handling, rubric structure, config.json weight invariant, SKILL.md sourcing, and plugin.json fields.

checklist.name: plugin.json name field
checklist.description: plugin.json contains a 'name' field with a non-empty string value

checklist.name: plugin.json private field
checklist.description: plugin.json contains a 'private' field set to true

checklist.name: plugin.json skills field
checklist.description: plugin.json contains a 'skills' field pointing to the skills directory

checklist.name: Three schema files present
checklist.description: All three files are present under skills/skill-reviewer/references/schemas/: rubric.schema.json, config.schema.json, and results.schema.json

checklist.name: Rubric evaluation_target
checklist.description: security.json rubric file contains an 'evaluation_target' field

checklist.name: Rubric scale
checklist.description: security.json rubric contains a 'scale' object with 'min' and 'max' numeric fields

checklist.name: Rubric reference_examples
checklist.description: security.json rubric contains a 'reference_examples' object with judging_guidelines, good_overall_examples, and bad_overall_examples arrays (each with at least one entry)

checklist.name: Dimension weights sum
checklist.description: List each dimension's 'weight' value in security.json, then add them together. Pass only if the sum is within 0.001 of 1.0.

checklist.name: Dimension required fields
checklist.description: Each dimension in security.json has all required fields: id (snake_case), name, weight, question, and scores array

checklist.name: config.json judge key matches rubric stem
checklist.description: config.json has a 'judges' map with a key named 'security' (matching the rubric filename stem security.json)

checklist.name: config.json weight invariant
checklist.description: List validation_weight and the security judge weight from config.json, then add them together. Pass only if the sum is within 0.001 of 1.0.

checklist.name: SKILL.md present
checklist.description: skills/skill-reviewer/SKILL.md file exists and is non-empty
